Requirements: __credits

Students must earn a minimum of 120 credits to

complete a degree.

Requirements for Graduation:

At least 30 credits must be earned at UMD

15 of the final 30 credits must be earned at the 300-400 level

12 upper level major credits must be earned at UMD

a ee ee

*Or a comparable AOSC course at the 200 level.

**AOSC498, the senior research project, will be submitted as

a scholarship in practice course.

*** Excluded from the 2.0 average calculation
